pip_2026-07-24.mp4.title: What happens when Pip presses a magical bath bomb? 🛁✨
pip_2026-07-24.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #1124: A little 'me' time for Pip today! This sparkly swirly ball looked so relaxing... until I put it in the Mystical Press! 🫧 The fizz was so surprising! What relaxing experiment should I try tomorrow? Let me know below! Pip-pip!
